untranslatable_reason: This signal describes an options strategy (diagonal bull spread with specific strike selection and expiration management) that cannot be expressed using only price-based technical indicators. The strategy requires: (1) options chain data with specific strike prices and expirations, (2) tracking multiple legs with different expiration dates, (3) dynamic reestablishment logic based on option expiration timing, and (4) strike price relationships. The allowed indicators are limited to price action, moving averages, and technical oscillators—none of which can capture options Greeks, expirations, or strike price structures needed for this diagonal spread strategy.
translation_notes: This is a multi-leg options strategy requiring options-specific data structures and expiration tracking. A backtest engine using only spot price indicators cannot properly model diagonal spreads. Consider implementing an options-capable backtesting framework or translating this to a simpler directional equity signal.
